surface_types.label: Government Advisory Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded government advisory, staff, appointment, or operating surface with identifiable participants and dates.

surface_types.label: Employment / Investment Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded company surface where employees, officers, founders, investors, or advisers are documented on the same company/investment object.

surface_types.label: Campaign Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded political campaign, campaign vendor, or campaign data operation surface.

surface_types.label: Founder / Officer Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded company formation, officer, founder, director, or official company-role surface.

surface_types.label: Customer / Vendor Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded customer, vendor, deployment, integration, or commercial-use surface.

surface_types.label: Category Formation Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded analyst, market, policy, or industry-category surface that makes a previously fringe capability legible as infrastructure.

surface_types.label: Board / Advisory Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded board, ethics board, advisory board, steering group, or oversight surface.

surface_types.label: Public / Private Fund Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded funding, development, investment, or regeneration surface containing both public and private institutional participants.

surface_types.label: Policy Document Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded authored, commissioned, accepted, or implementation policy document surface.

surface_types.label: Procurement / Contract Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded procurement, award, contract, grant, or programme delivery surface.

surface_types.label: Directory / Roster Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded roster, directory, cohort, or listed-membership surface.

surface_types.label: Democratic Input Replacement Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded system where modeled or synthetic populations substitute for direct consultation with real citizens, readers, customers, or affected publics.

surface_types.label: Model Governance Surface
surface_types.description: A bounded surface concerning who controls model behavior, data, prompts, weights, feedback loops, or synthetic proxies.

surface_types.label: Context Only Surface
surface_types.description: A surface that preserves explanatory context but cannot create Clifford Number hops.

surface_types.label: Public / Private AI Infrastructure
surface_types.description: Surface logic where public/government AI capability and private company/investment infrastructure occupy the same bounded object.

surface_types.label: Surface Factory Capital Layer
surface_types.description: Capital surface around an organization that produces multiple downstream bounded surfaces.

surface_types.label: Governance Continuity Surface
surface_types.description: Surface showing continuity of bureaucratic/governance actors across political turnover and public/private venues.

surface_types.label: Defence Industrial Surface
surface_types.description: Surface involving defence industrial participants, public funds, or strategic industry corridors.

surface_types.label: Policy to Procurement Surface
surface_types.description: Surface where policy recommendations, government delivery machinery, and procurement/customer pathways connect.
